reasoning: This substance is dipentyl phthalate (1,2-benzenedicarboxylic acid esterified with pentanol isomers), which is an ester of phthalic acid (1,2-benzenedicarboxylic acid). Phthalate esters fall under the direct parent category of p-Phthalate esters in ChemOnt, though technically this is an o-phthalate; however 'p-Phthalate esters' is the available label for phthalate diesters in the taxonomy.
substance_name: 1,2-Benzenedicarboxylic acid, dipentyl ester, branched and linear
